trades.reasoning: Top-ranked candidate (score 100) with every bullish signal firing including a volume surge >1.5x the 20-day average — volume confirmation separates this from the pack in today's risk-on tape.
Score 95 with RSI 69.7 in the bullish momentum zone, MACD crossover confirmed, and fintech names tend to outperform in risk-on sessions as rate-sensitive sentiment improves.

decisions.briefing: Markets are firmly risk-on with NASDAQ +0.8% and S&P 500 +0.6%, a clean backdrop for momentum plays. I'm deploying the remaining $943 into CHRN and SOFI — the two most compelling setups available — filling two of the four open slots while leaving some cash as a buffer. Existing positions show no stop-loss or profit-target triggers and the overall book sits at a healthy +25.6%, so no sells are warranted today.

market_education.summary_en: Equity markets advanced broadly on May 28 as improved risk appetite lifted growth and technology sectors, with the NASDAQ outperforming at +0.8%. Easing macro headwinds and constructive earnings revisions in the tech sector continued to draw buyers into higher-beta names. The broad participation across sectors suggested institutional confidence rather than a narrow speculative move.
market_education.summary_zh: 5月28日股市全面上揚，風險偏好改善帶動成長股與科技板塊走強，納斯達克指數以0.8%的漲幅領先大盤。宏觀面壓力持續緩和，加上科技業盈利預期獲調升，吸引資金流入高Beta股票。各板塊的普遍參與顯示此次上漲由機構資金主導，而非單純的投機行情。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A volume surge happens when a stock's trading volume jumps well above its recent average — CHRN's volume today is more than 1.5x its 20-day norm. When a price breakout is accompanied by heavy volume, it means many buyers are actively participating, which validates the move. A breakout on thin volume is far less trustworthy because it can reverse easily.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 成交量激增是指某支股票的交易量遠超近期平均水準——CHRN今日成交量超過20日均量的1.5倍。當股價突破時伴隨大量成交，代表大批買家積極入場，這使漲勢更具說服力。反之，若突破時成交量偏低，行情便容易後繼無力甚至反轉，可信度大打折扣。
